final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing museum-style Chinese infographic illustration of 中国少数民族服饰, structured as a 文博图鉴 reference plate.

Style/medium: needs a 国家博物馆展板 / 历史服饰图鉴 aesthetic — exact illustration technique and rendering fineness are yours
Composition: must follow this fixed layout:
  顶部：中文主标题 + 副标题 + 导语
  左侧：结构拆解区，中文引线标注关键部件，并配局部特写
  右上：材质 / 工艺 / 质感区，展示真实纹理小样并附说明
  右中：纹样 / 色彩 / 寓意区，展示主色板、纹样样本和文化解释
  底部：穿着顺序 / 构成流程图 + 核心特征总结
Subject: must include a full-body standing figure (真实人物全身站姿) as central subject, wearing a complete 中国少数民族 traditional costume — specific ethnic group, garment system, key components, construction details, and material craft to be determined by the model based on best representational value
Scene/backdrop: must use a 米白 / 绢纸白 / 浅茶色 paper-texture background — exact tone and surface grain are yours
Lighting/mood: needs a controlled, neutral museum-display atmosphere — exact light direction is yours
Color palette: needs a restrained, scholarly 文博 direction anchored by the costume's authentic ethnic color system — exact palette and ratios are yours
Materials/textures: needs genuine textile surface differentiation (silk / embroidery / woven fabric / metalwork) rendered with material realism — exact sheen and grain treatment are yours
Text (verbatim): must include all annotation text in 简体中文 — including: 主标题、副标题、导语、部件引线标注、材质说明、纹样寓意解释、色彩含义说明、穿着顺序流程、核心特征总结; all characters must be legible, correctly written simplified Chinese — no romanization, no English, no garbled characters
Constraints: must preserve complete infographic structure across all five layout zones; all in-image text must be simplified Chinese, clear and readable; central figure must be photorealistic full-body standing pose; material swatches and pattern samples must appear as distinct inset panels; annotation leader lines must connect clearly to labeled components
Avoid: poster aesthetic, portrait-studio feel, e-commerce product-page feel, anime or illustration style, cosplay feel, misaligned annotations, structurally incorrect garment details, blurred or garbled text, fake or undifferentiated material textures, excessive decorative elements
